title: NHS Expands AI Tools to Improve Patient Care and Reduce Wait Times
subtitle: New digital systems aim to simplify how patients access doctors, but experts warn that a clear long-term plan is needed.

summary.en: The NHS is launching a new AI tool on its mobile app to help patients find the right medical services. This system will triage patients, directing them to pharmacies or A&E if they do not need a GP appointment. The project is part of a large £10bn investment to update technology across the health service. While officials believe this will save time, some health experts are concerned about privacy and the lack of a clear long-term strategy. The government hopes these changes will eventually end the difficult morning rush for same-day appointments.
summary.zh: 英國國家醫療保健服務正在其行動應用程式上推出一項新的人工智慧工具，以協助病患尋找合適的醫療服務。該系統將對病患進行分流，若病患不需要家庭醫師門診，則引導他們前往藥局或急診室。此計畫是總額一百億英鎊、旨在更新醫療服務技術的大型投資案之一。儘管官員認為這將節省時間，但部分醫療專家對隱私問題以及缺乏明確長期策略感到擔憂。政府希望這些變革最終能終結民眾每天早上為了預約當日門診而奔波的困境。

paragraphs.en: The National Health Service (NHS) is moving forward with a major digital upgrade, introducing artificial intelligence (AI) to its official mobile app. This new tool is designed to triage patients—a process of assessing how sick a patient is to decide what kind of care they need. By using this technology, the app will help patients determine if they truly require a GP appointment or if they would be better served by visiting a local pharmacy or an A&E department. This update is expected to reach 200,000 patients over the coming year, with full availability for all users planned by April 2028.
paragraphs.zh: 英國國家醫療保健服務（NHS）正推動一項重大的數位升級，在其官方行動應用程式中導入人工智慧。這項新工具旨在進行病患分流，即評估病患的病情嚴重程度，以決定他們需要何種醫療照護。透過這項技術，應用程式將協助病患判斷是否真的需要預約家庭醫師，或是前往當地藥局或急診室會更為合適。這項更新預計在未來一年內涵蓋二十萬名病患，並計畫於二零二八年四月前全面開放給所有使用者。

paragraphs.en: This initiative is part of a larger £10bn government funding package aimed at modernizing the health service. According to The Guardian Health, the goal is to improve efficiency and reduce the time patients spend waiting for help. The move also addresses a key promise made by the government before the 2024 election: to end the daily struggle where patients compete for limited same-day GP appointments every morning at 8 a.m. A trial of similar technology at the Wealden Ridge Medical Partnership in Sussex has already shown promise, resulting in a 29% drop in the number of people waiting on phone lines for an appointment.
paragraphs.zh: 這項計畫是政府一項總額一百億英鎊資金方案的一部分，旨在推動醫療服務現代化。根據《衛報健康》報導，其目標在於提升效率並縮短病患等待協助的時間。此舉也回應了政府在二零二四年大選前做出的關鍵承諾：終結病患每天早上八點為了爭搶有限的當日家庭醫師門診名額而苦惱的現狀。在薩塞克斯郡的威爾登嶺醫療合夥診所進行的類似技術試驗已展現成效，預約掛號電話的等待人數減少了百分之二十九。

paragraphs.en: Beyond patient triage, the NHS is also testing AI to record medical consultations. The goal of this technology is to reduce the time doctors spend taking notes, allowing them to focus more on their patients. Officials cited a trial at Great Ormond Street hospital, which took place across nine sites in London. The results showed that staff spent 25% more time interacting with patients when the AI tool was used. Health Secretary James Murray stated he was certain that these technological advances would help get patients to the right care faster and free clinicians from large amounts of paperwork.
paragraphs.zh: 除了病患分流外，國家醫療保健服務也正在測試利用人工智慧記錄醫療諮詢過程。這項技術的目標是減少醫師撰寫筆記的時間，讓他們能更專注於病患身上。官員引述了在倫敦九個據點進行的大奧蒙德街醫院試驗，結果顯示，在使用人工智慧工具時，醫護人員與病患互動的時間增加了百分之二十五。衛生大臣莫瑞（James Murray）表示，他確信這些技術進步將有助於讓病患更快獲得適當的照護，並將臨床醫師從繁重的文書工作中解放出來。

paragraphs.en: Despite the optimism from government officials, many health leaders are calling for a more careful approach. While acknowledging that the investment is a positive step toward a 21st-century health service, experts argue that the NHS lacks a clear, long-term strategy for how AI should be used across the entire system. Tim Horton, deputy director of policy at the Health Foundation, noted that without a broader plan, the NHS risks adopting AI in a scattered way, making it difficult to see real benefits on a large scale. He emphasized that the health service needs a clear blueprint to guide these changes effectively.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管政府官員持樂觀態度，許多醫療界領袖仍呼籲採取更謹慎的做法。專家們雖然承認這項投資是邁向二十一世紀醫療服務的正面一步，但他們認為國家醫療保健服務缺乏一套明確且長期的策略，來規範人工智慧應如何在整個系統中運用。健康基金會政策副主任霍頓（Tim Horton）指出，若沒有更廣泛的計畫，國家醫療保健服務可能會以零散的方式採用人工智慧，導致難以在大規模層面上看到實質效益。他強調，醫療服務體系需要一份清晰的藍圖來有效引導這些變革。

paragraphs.en: There are also significant concerns regarding patient privacy and the potential for new technology to create barriers for some people. Lynn Woolsey, the chief nursing officer at the Royal College of Nursing, warned that the app rollout must be handled with care. She noted that there are growing concerns about whether the productivity benefits of AI are being overstated. Woolsey also highlighted the need to protect patient confidentiality, especially when using voice-recording technology. She added that the system must be accurate, as any errors could create more work for staff rather than reducing it. Furthermore, there are worries that patients who are not confident using digital technology could be left behind or disadvantaged by these changes.
paragraphs.zh: 此外，關於病患隱私以及新技術可能對部分民眾造成障礙的擔憂也相當顯著。皇家護理學院的護理長伍爾西（Lynn Woolsey）警告，應用程式的推廣必須謹慎處理。她指出，外界越來越擔心人工智慧帶來的生產力提升是否被過度誇大。伍爾西也強調保護病患機密的重要性，特別是在使用語音記錄技術時。她補充說，系統必須精確，因為任何錯誤都可能增加醫護人員的工作負擔，而非減輕負擔。此外，也有人擔心不擅長使用數位技術的病患可能會在這些變革中被遺落或處於不利地位。

paragraphs.en: Finally, the practical application of this funding remains a top priority for local leaders. Ciarán Devane, chief executive of the NHS Alliance, argued that the most important issue is how the £10bn investment will be used to support local teams. He suggested that local leaders should have the freedom to choose the technologies and solutions that work best for their specific communities. As the NHS continues to roll out these tools, the challenge will be balancing the need for faster, more efficient care with the need to protect patient data and ensure that all citizens can access the services they need, regardless of their comfort level with new technology.
paragraphs.zh: 最後，這筆資金的實際應用仍是地方領袖的首要考量。國家醫療保健服務聯盟執行長德文（Ciarán Devane）主張，最重要的議題在於這一百億英鎊的投資將如何用於支援地方團隊。他建議地方領袖應有權選擇最適合其特定社區的技術與解決方案。隨著國家醫療保健服務持續推廣這些工具，挑戰將在於如何在追求更快速、更有效率的照護，與保護病患資料並確保所有公民都能獲得所需服務之間取得平衡，無論他們對新技術的熟悉程度為何。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To be helped or provided with what is needed.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 被服務；得到幫助或滿足需求。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「服務」或「上菜」，這裡指病患透過其他方式獲得更好的醫療協助。文中：or if they would be better served by visiting a local pharmacy or an A&E department.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To officially introduce or launch a new product or service.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 正式推出或啟用（新產品或服務）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「滾動」，這裡指新科技或服務的推廣。文中：She noted that there are growing concerns about whether the productivity benefits of AI are being overstated.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To be excluded or fail to keep up with progress.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 被拋在後頭；跟不上進度或發展。
keyTerms.noteZh: 字面意思是「被遺留在後面」，這裡指因數位能力不足而無法跟上科技進步的人。文中：Furthermore, there are worries that patients who are not confident using digital technology could be left behind or disadvantaged by these changes.

sources.name: The Guardian Health
sources.title: NHS to use AI on its app to direct patients to appropriate services

previousArticles.title: NHS to Use Artificial Intelligence to Improve Patient Care
previousArticles.summaryEn: The NHS is introducing artificial intelligence to its official app to help direct patients to the right medical services. This new tool will triage patients, deciding if they need a doctor's appointment or care from a pharmacy. The government hopes this will solve the problem of long phone queues for GP appointments. While officials believe this will save time and improve efficiency, some experts have raised concerns about privacy and the need for a long-term plan. The project is part of a large investment to update technology across the health service.

quiz.question: What specific outcome was observed during the trial of AI technology at the Wealden Ridge Medical Partnership?

options.A: A 25% increase in time spent interacting with patients.
options.B: A 29% reduction in the number of people waiting on phone lines.
options.C: A significant decrease in the number of GP appointments requested.
options.D: A complete elimination of the need for patients to call for appointments.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，Wealden Ridge Medical Partnership 的試驗結果顯示，電話排隊預約的人數下降了 29%。選項 A 是 Great Ormond Street 醫院的數據，非此處試驗結果；選項 C 雖提到預約，但文章並未指出預約總量下降，而是排隊時間減少；選項 D 誇大了效果，文章僅提到電話等待人數減少，並未說完全消除預約需求。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the government's motivation for introducing AI triage in the NHS app?

options.A: To replace the need for physical GP practices entirely by 2028.
options.B: To ensure that all patients receive medical advice without ever seeing a doctor.
options.C: To alleviate the pressure caused by the current system of competing for same-day appointments.
options.D: To prioritize the use of voice-recording technology over traditional patient assessment.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。文章第二段提到，此舉是為了兌現 2024 年大選前的承諾，解決病人每天早上 8 點爭搶有限預約名額的困境。選項 A 錯誤，文章並未提到要取代實體診所；選項 B 錯誤，AI 是為了分流（triage），並非取代醫生診斷；選項 D 錯誤，語音記錄是另一項技術測試，與分流系統的目的不同，且並非優先於分流。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the word 'scattered' imply about the potential implementation of AI?

options.A: It will be implemented in a disorganized and uncoordinated manner.
options.B: It will be distributed evenly across all regions of the country.
options.C: It will be used to target a wide variety of medical conditions.
options.D: It will be tested in many different hospitals simultaneously.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中 Tim Horton 提到若無整體規劃，NHS 可能會以「scattered」的方式採用 AI，這在文中帶有負面含義，意指缺乏系統性與整合性。選項 B 與原意相反；選項 C 雖然 AI 可能應用於多種疾病，但這不是該詞在文中的核心語境；選項 D 雖然提到多點測試，但「scattered」強調的是缺乏策略的碎片化，而非測試地點的數量。

quiz.question: Which statement best summarizes the overall message of the article?

options.A: The NHS is successfully using AI to solve all its administrative problems.
options.B: Government officials and health experts are in complete agreement regarding AI implementation.
options.C: AI technology is being introduced to the NHS, but its success depends on addressing significant strategic and practical challenges.
options.D: The £10bn funding package is primarily focused on upgrading hardware rather than improving patient care.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文結構先介紹 AI 的引進與預期效益，接著轉折提到專家對缺乏長期策略的擔憂，以及隱私、數位落差與執行細節的挑戰，顯示出這是一個多面向且具爭議的議題。選項 A 過度樂觀；選項 B 與事實不符，文中明確提到專家與官員意見分歧；選項 D 錯誤，資金目的是現代化服務以提升效率，而非僅限於硬體升級。
